title: Support
content_markdown:
# Welcome to CreditReports.dk Support Page

You will find answers to most common questions and problems by following the links below. If you could not find what you were looking for, you can always [contact us](https://creditreports.dk/contact/) and we will get back to you.

Thank you for using our Credit Risk Report platform!

![Get started](/assets/wordpress-media/2020/05/started-300x300.png)

##### Get started

For how to get started with our Credit risk report platform

Get started

![Support portal](/assets/wordpress-media/2020/05/moreinfo-1-300x300.png)

##### Support portal

For detailed instructions on how to use the system

Support portal

![Product ](/assets/wordpress-media/2020/05/product-300x300.png)

##### Product

For more information about our credit risk report platform

Product information

![Credit risk models](/assets/wordpress-media/2020/05/models-300x300.png)

##### Credit risk models

For more information about our credit risk models

Model documentation

![FAQ](/assets/wordpress-media/2024/03/faq-1-300x300.png)

##### FAQ

For details on how we calculate specific variables featured on our platform

FAQ

![Platform tutorials](/assets/wordpress-media/2024/04/platform_tutorials_V2-300x300.png)

##### Platform tutorials

For both video and text tutorials on how to use our platform

Platform tutorials
